creator: oleg@mamontov.net
text:

> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/147319

Same pr (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/147406) =
already approved.
This pr may be closed.

>=20
